summary: Diff implements shared helpers to deep-clone and insert full Question objects into paper sections (with new IDs and computed headingId), wires Question Bank “Use” to use that helper, and adds inline editing state/actions for personal questions. Evidence for AI “Add to Paper” insertion handling, match-pairs editor+renderer side-by-side enforcement, and table UI/border/whitespace improvements is incomplete or not present in the shown changes. Also includes unrelated global theme/token changes in index.css.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the AI “Add to Paper” insertion so that it reliably inserts questions into the paper editor section indicated by the insert context, returns to the Real Paper editor, and shows a clear error message (and no insertion) when there is no insert context.
missing_requirements.reason: The AI page shows insert-context retrieval and imports the insertion helper, but the critical logic is truncated right at `handleAddToPaper` and shows `if (!insertContext) { return; // Er...` with no visible user-facing error message, insertion, context clearing, or navigation back to the editor.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the match-pairs (Column A / Column B) editor and renderer so Column A and Column B are always strictly side-by-side at all viewport widths (no stacking), including editor and renderer/print modes.
missing_requirements.reason: Renderer changes for match-pairs are truncated; while an `overflow-x-auto` wrapper appears, there is no visible confirmation of a fixed two-column layout (e.g., min-width/grid/flex with no wrap) and no evidence of corresponding editor-side changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Improve the table question UI: show “Column A” and “Column B” headers, make those headers editable, and render darker borders (inner and outer) in both normal and print views.
missing_requirements.reason: Only the data model is extended with optional `columnHeaders`; there is no visible table editor/renderer UI implementation for displaying/editing headers or darker border styling in the provided diffs.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reduce excessive blank/unused space when an image is inserted into a table cell so cell height fits image/content better while keeping resize controls functional and not breaking print rendering.
missing_requirements.reason: Rich cell editor/renderer code is shown, but there’s no clear evidence of CSS/layout changes specifically targeting table-cell image whitespace/min-height/line-height/padding issues (and relevant CSS is truncated).

hallucinated_features.description: Global theme/token adjustments (multiple CSS color variables for light/dark mode, sidebar colors, charts, etc.).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any REQ; build request focuses on insertion/editing and match-pairs/table layouts, not overall theming.
